body: Suresh, 145 reviews ho gaye Mylari ke — sirf 5 aur aur aap 150 ka milestone cross kar lete hain! Aapka CTR 3.2% hai jo peer median 2.5% se kaafi upar hai. Kya main aapke top 3 reviews ko ek Google post mein highlight kar doon? 10 min mein live ho jayega.
rationale: Merchant is 5 reviews away from the 150 milestone — used specificity lever with exact count (145/150) and above-peer CTR (3.2% vs 2.5% median). Effort externalization CTA: offered to draft and post the content immediately.

body: Mukesh, views this week jumped 14% — Pizza Spot ka momentum build ho raha hai. CTR 5.3% hai which is already 2x the peer average of 2.5%. Ek active offer add karo toh yeh traffic converts bhi hoga. Kya main ek ₹99 combo deal draft kar doon jo aaj live ho jaye?
rationale: Merchant has strong CTR (5.3% vs 2.5% peer) and 14% weekly view spike but no active offers — used loss aversion (traffic not converting without an offer) and effort externalization by offering to draft a deal immediately.

body: Bharat, calls is week 50% neeche aayi hain — baseline 12 se sirf 4 reh gayi. CTR 1.8% hai while peer median 3.0% hai. No active offers aur GBP unverified — yeh do cheezein fix karne se views wapas aa sakti hain. Kya main ek ₹299 cleaning offer draft karoon aur GBP verification ka process start karoon?
rationale: Calls dropped 50% (12 baseline to 4) and CTR is 1.8% vs 3.0% peer median — used specific numbers for loss aversion. Root cause identified: no offers + unverified GBP. Effort externalization: offered to fix both immediately.

body: Sushma, Beauty Bar ka CTR 5.8% hai — peer average 4.0% se upar 💪. But no active offers hain abhi. Summer hai — hair spa aur smoothening inquiries peak par hoti hain is season mein. Ek ₹499 Summer Hair Spa offer add karein toh yeh traffic convert hoga. Kya main draft karoon?
rationale: CTR is above peer (5.8% vs 4.0%) but no active offers means traffic is not converting. Used seasonal beat (summer hair services peak) and effort externalization to draft an offer. Reframed as opportunity not failure.

body: Padma, calls this week 15% upar aayi — 18 se 21 ho gayi. Driver likely: kids yoga post. CTR 6.2% hai which is already above peer 4.5%. Trial-to-paid conversion 55% hai — yeh momentum capture karne ka best time hai. Free Body Composition offer ko push karoon toh new members convert ho sakte hain. Reply YES?
rationale: Calls up 15% driven by kids yoga post — used specificity (15%, 18→21 calls, 55% conversion rate) and social proof (CTR 6.2% vs 4.5% peer). Effort externalization: offered to push the existing free offer to capture the momentum.

body: Vikas, calls this week 5% upar aayi hain. CTR 4.1% hai — peer average 3.8% se thoda upar. Lekin GBP unverified hai aur delivery set up nahi hai. Yeh do cheezein fix ho jaayein toh aapka CTR aur 30-40% improve ho sakta hai. Kya main GBP verification aur delivery setup ka walkthrough share karoon?
rationale: Small performance uptick (5% calls) used as positive hook, then pivoted to two fixable root causes: unverified GBP and no delivery setup. Used specificity (4.1% vs 3.8% CTR) and loss aversion (missing 30-40% potential improvement).

body: Hi Priya! Dr. Meera's Dental Clinic ki taraf se — aapka 6-month cleaning due hai (last visit May 2026). Slots available hain: Wed 5 Nov 6pm ya Thu 6 Nov 5pm. Cleaning ₹299 mein hogi. Reply 1 for Wed ya 2 for Thu 🦷
rationale: Customer-facing recall message using exact available slots (Wed 5 Nov 6pm, Thu 6 Nov 5pm) and real catalog price (₹299). Hindi-English mix per language preference. Binary slot choice as CTA reduces friction to booking.

body: Hi Diya! Zen Yoga Studio from Padma — we miss you on the mat 🧘. Our 6-month retention is 78% — members who come back stay longer. Free Body Composition Analysis this week for returning members, slots Tue and Thu mornings. Want me to block 1 slot? Reply YES.
rationale: Customer-facing recall using real retention stat (78%) as social proof to reduce return anxiety. Real offer (Free Body Composition Analysis) as re-engagement hook. Binary YES CTA minimizes friction.

body: Dr. Meera, DCI ka naya radiograph compliance mandate aa gaya hai — Dec 15 deadline hai. Aapke 124 high-risk adult patients hain jo directly affected ho sakte hain. Maine checklist draft ki hai: RVG setup audit, patient record update, aur compliance certificate. Kya main yeh 3-step process aapke saath walk-through karoon? Reply YES.
rationale: Regulatory deadline (DCI Dec 15) used as urgency anchor with specific patient count (124 high-risk adults) affected. Effort externalization: checklist already drafted covering 3 concrete steps. Clinical peer tone matching dentist category voice.
